statement: Convex logs-only is insufficient as the primary foundation for historical, agentic end-to-end debugging in this repo.
rationale: Logs are useful but the codebase currently emits sparse structured logs and lacks durable event-level causality.
keyAssumptions: Historical and causal debugging is a core requirement.
Team wants machine-queryable diagnostics, not manual log spelunking.
validationCriteria: Critical incident reconstructions can be completed from telemetry tables without log-only dependency.
critiquePoints: Convex log streams can partially satisfy requirements if available and well-configured.
questions: Is the deployment on a plan that supports log streams in all needed environments?
